1.gl: Shushan-Eduth or Shoshannim-Eduth, the title of a popular song
1.dv: or (plural of former) שׁוֹשַׁנִּים עֵדוּתlemma שׁוֹשַׁנִּיס עֵדוּת samekh, corrected to שׁוֹשַׁנִּים עֵדוּת; from H7799 (שׁוּשַׁן) and H5715 (עֵדוּת);

1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: Asaph, the name of three Israelites, and of the family of the first
properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
2.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

2.gl: to tend a flock; i.e. pasture it; intransitively, to graze (literally or figuratively); generally to rule; by extension, to associate with (as a friend)
2.kj: [idiom] break, companion, keep company with, devour, eat up, evil entreat, feed, use as a friend, make friendship with, herdman, keep (sheep) (-er), pastor, [phrase] shearing house

2.gl: to drive forth (a person, an animal or chariot), i.e. lead, carry away; reflexively, to proceed (i.e. impel or guide oneself); also (from the panting induced by effort), to sigh
2.kj: acquaint, bring (away), carry away, drive (away), lead (away, forth), (be) guide, lead (away, forth).

2.gl: a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men)
2.dv: or צאוֹן; (Psalm 144:13), from an unused root meaning to migrate;

2.gl: to broaden out the ear (with the hand), i.e. (by implication) to listen
2.kj: give (perceive by the) ear, hear(-ken). See H239 (אָזַן).
2.dv: a primitive root; probably to expand; but used only as a denominative from H241 (אֹזֶן);

2.gl: Joseph, the name of seven Israelites
2.dv: future of H3254 (יָסַף); let him add (or perhaps simply active participle adding);

3.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
3.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
3.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

3.gl: to walk (literally or figuratively); causatively, to carry (in various senses)
3.kj: [idiom] again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, [phrase] follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), gro

3.gl: something saved, i.e. (abstractly) deliverance; hence, aid, victory, prosperity
3.kj: deliverance, health, help(-ing), salvation, save, saving (health), welfare.
(a-) wake(-n, up), lift up (self), [idiom] master, raise (up), stir up (self).
3.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with through the idea of opening the eyes);

3.gl: force (literally or figuratively); by implication, valor, victory
3.kj: force, mastery, might, mighty (act, power), power, strength.
3.dv: feminine passive participle from the same as H1368 (גִּבּוֹר);

3.gl: Binjamin, youngest son of Jacob; also the tribe descended from him, and its territory
3.dv: from H1121 (בֵּן) and H3225 (יָמִין); son of (the) right hand;

4.gl: to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again
4.kj: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) [idiom] again, (cause to) answer ([phrase] again), [idiom]

4.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
4.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
4.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

4.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
4.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

4.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
4.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

4.gl: to be (causative, make) luminous (literally and metaphorically)
4.kj: [idiom] break of day, glorious, kindle, (be, en-, give, show) light (-en, -ened), set on fire, shine.

5.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
5.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

5.gl: a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. organized forwar (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship)
5.kj: appointed time, ([phrase]) army, ([phrase]) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare).

5.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
properly, extent (of time); but used only adverbially (especially with other particle prefixes), when (either relative or interrogative)
5.dv: from an unused root meaning to extend;

5.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
5.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

5.gl: to smoke, whether literal or figurative

6.gl: a triple, i.e. (as a musical instrument) a triangle (or perhaps rather threestringed lute); also (as an indefinite, great quantity) a three-fold measure (perhaps a treble ephah); also (as an officer) a general of the thi
6.kj: captain, instrument of musick, (great) lord, (great) measure, prince, three (from the margin).
6.dv: or שָׁלוֹשׁ; (1 Chronicles 11:11; 1 Chronicles 12:18), or שָׁלֹשׁ; (2 Samuel 23:13), from H7969 (שָׁלוֹשׁ);

6.kj: [idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

6.gl: to quaff, i.e. (causatively) to irrigate or furnish apotion to
6.kj: cause to (give, give to, let, make to) drink, drown, moisten, water. See H7937 (שָׁכַר), H8354 (שָׁתָה).

6.gl: food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
6.kj: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.
6.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם); See also H1036 (בֵּית לְעַפְרָה)

7.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
7.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

7.gl: to deride; by implication (as if imitating a foreigner) to speak unintelligibly
7.kj: have in derision, laugh (to scorn), mock (on), stammering.
brawling, contention(-ous), discord, strife. Compare H4079 (מִדְיָן), H4090 (מְדָן).

7.gl: a resident; by extension, a fellow-citizen

7.dv: or (fully) אוֹיֵב; active participle of H340 (אָיַב);

8.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

8.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
8.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

8.gl: a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. organized forwar (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship)
8.kj: appointed time, ([phrase]) army, ([phrase]) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare).

8.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
8.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

8.gl: to be (causative, make) luminous (literally and metaphorically)
8.kj: [idiom] break of day, glorious, kindle, (be, en-, give, show) light (-en, -ened), set on fire, shine.

9.gl: properly, to pull up, especially the tent-pins, i.e. start on ajourney
9.kj: cause to blow, bring, get, (make to) go (away, forth, forward, onward, out), (take) journey, march, remove, set aside (forward), [idiom] still, be on his (go their) way.

9.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
9.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

9.gl: to drive out from a possession; especially to expatriate or divorce
9.kj: cast up (out), divorced (woman), drive away (forth, out), expel, [idiom] surely put away, trouble, thrust out.

9.gl: properly, to strike in, i.e. fix; specifically, to plant (literally or figuratively)
a vine (as twining), especially the grape
9.dv: from an unused root meaning to bend;

9.gl: Mitsrajim, i.e. Upper and Lower Egypt

10.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
10.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
10.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

10.gl: to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively)
10.kj: accomplish, confirm, [phrase] consecrate, be at an end, be expired, be fenced, fill, fulfil, (be, become, [idiom] draw, give in, go) full(-ly, -ly set, tale), (over-) flow, fulness

10.gl: to turn; by implication, to face, i.e. appear, look, etc.
10.kj: appear, at (even-) tide, behold, cast out, come on, [idiom] corner, dawning, empty, go away, lie, look, mark, pass away, prepare, regard, (have) respect (to), (re-) turn (aside, aw

10.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
10.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
10.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

10.gl: to root, i.e. strike into the soil, or (by implication) to pluck from it

11.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
11.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

11.gl: properly, to plump, i.e. fill up hollows; by implication, to cover (for clothing or secrecy)
11.kj: clad self, close, clothe, conceal, cover (self), (flee to) hide, overwhelm. Compare H3780 (כָּשָׂה).

11.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)

11.dv: from an unused root meaning to cover;

11.gl: a cedar tree (from the tenacity of its roots)

12.gl: to send away, for, or out (in a great variety of applications)
12.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring (on the way), cast (away, out), conduct, [idiom] earnestly, forsake, give (up), grow long, lay, leave, let depart (down, go, loose), push away, put

12.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
12.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

12.gl: severed, i.e. harvest (as reaped), the crop, the time, the reaper, or figuratively; also a limb (of a tree, or simply foliage)
a stream (including the sea; expectation the Nile, Euphrates, etc.); figuratively, prosperity

13.gl: to cross over; used very widely of any transition (literal or figurative; transitive, intransitive, intensive, causative); specifically, to cover (in copulation)
13.kj: alienate, alter, [idiom] at all, beyond, bring (over, through), carry over, (over-) come (on, over), conduct (over), convey over, current, deliver, do away, enter, escape, fail, ge

13.gl: properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adv
13.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
13.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

13.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
13.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

13.gl: to break out (in many applications, direct and indirect, literal and figurative)
13.kj: [idiom] abroad, (make a) breach, break (away, down, -er, forth, in, up), burst out, come (spread) abroad, compel, disperse, grow, increase, open, press, scatter, urge.

13.gl: a circumvallation; by implication, an inclosure

14.gl: to tend a flock; i.e. pasture it; intransitively, to graze (literally or figuratively); generally to rule; by extension, to associate with (as a friend)
14.kj: [idiom] break, companion, keep company with, devour, eat up, evil entreat, feed, use as a friend, make friendship with, herdman, keep (sheep) (-er), pastor, [phrase] shearing house

14.gl: a copse of bushes; hence, a forest; hence, honey in the comb (as hived in trees)
14.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to thicken with verdure;

14.gl: fulness of the breast; also a moving creature
14.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to be conspicuous;

14.kj: country, field, ground, land, soil, [idiom] wild.
14.dv: or שָׂדַי; from an unused root meaning to spread out;
from an unused root probably meaning to enclose;

15.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
15.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

15.gl: a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. organized forwar (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship)
15.kj: appointed time, ([phrase]) army, ([phrase]) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare).

15.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
15.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

16.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
16.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

16.gl: to be alert, physically (on foot) or mentally (in courage)
16.kj: confirm, be courageous (of good courage, stedfastly minded, strong, stronger), establish, fortify, harden, increase, prevail, strengthen (self), make strong (obstinate, speed).

16.gl: the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south
properly, to strike in, i.e. fix; specifically, to plant (literally or figuratively)

18.dv: a primitive word; in distinction from H3709 (כַּף), the closed one); used (as noun, adverb, etc.) in a great variety of applications, both literally a

19.gl: to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications)
19.kj: bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(-ation), pronounce, publish, re
19.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met);

19.gl: to live, whether literally or figuratively; causatively, to revive
19.kj: keep (leave, make) alive, [idiom] certainly, give (promise) life, (let, suffer to) live, nourish up, preserve (alive), quicken, recover, repair, restore (to life), revive, ([idiom]

19.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
19.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

19.gl: properly, to flinch, i.e. (by implication) to go back, literally (to retreat) or figuratively (to apostatize)
19.kj: backslider, drive, go back, turn (away, back).
